name: Crackling Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the corn-meal, flour, sugar, and salt.
2. Add the egg to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined with the milk and cracklings.
3. Stir thoroughly to ensure all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Grease a shallow baking pan or griddle with oil.
5. Pour the batter into the greased pan in small mounds, about 1 tablespoon each.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 450°F (232°C) for about 20 minutes, or until golden brown when dropped from a spoon onto a hot, well-oiled griddle.
7. Serve and enjoy.
6 servings
Virginia Cooper, New Orleans, LA
